title: Physically validate LilyGO GNSS time provider epoch behavior
description: Follow-up split from project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.8. No-hardware work now routes valid Zephyr GNSS UTC through the HAL time provider and build/provision epoch floor, with native_sim/qemu coverage. Remaining work requires physical LilyGO-class GNSS hardware: verify real GNSS lock publishes UTC only with a valid fix, below-floor/default epochs are rejected as diagnostics, valid GNSS UTC establishes wall clock, and location metadata still flows independently. Record board/revision, receiver/module, commands, logs, and observed HAL/app status.
